title: 高松宮記念の後に・遠ざかる背中

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Things have never been as fired up here at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen as they are today, folks!

After catching her breath, Fuji Kiseki faces the
crowd and waves.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, everyone! Your cheers make
everything worth it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My next race will be the Yasuda Kinen, where the
battleground is in my favor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll be there to witness the superior
miracle I'll create!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That was amazing! Man, she's totally going to win
all these races, true to her word!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it's too early to tell. This was just a
sprint, you know.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member
text_block_list.text:
Fuji seriously is the best! She was great as a
classic racer, and I bet things will only get better
for her!

News articles celebrating Fuji Kiseki's
performance at the Takamatsunomiya Kinen
follow at unstoppable speed.
Videos of the race reach over a million views, and the issue of Twinkle Monthly featuring her is sold out everywhere.

Her rise is now approaching the scale of a proper
social phenomenon.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry! Yeah, I was just lost in thought.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
There are reporters here today too, right? Oof, I
can't be spacing out like this!

Her next race will be the mile-long Yasuda Kinen.
As Fuji Kiseki races down the turf, flashes from
countless news cameras follow her.
